title: Report a lost or stolen card and freeze it
text: If your card is lost or stolen, freeze it immediately: open the app, go to Cards, select the card, and tap "Freeze." Freezing blocks new purchases right away while keeping your account open. From the same screen you can order a replacement, which typically arrives in 3 to 5 business days. Review your recent transactions for anything you don't recognize and report unauthorized charges so we can dispute them and issue a new card number.
